prompt: I'm working in the Aria project at /home/dev/Aria which is a meta-repo with three submodules: aria (→ 10CG/aria-plugin), standards (→ 10CG/aria-standards), and aria-orchestrator (→ 10CG/aria-orchestrator). Please execute the state-scanner skill and report ALL open GitHub/Forgejo issues across all repos (main repo + submodules) that I should triage. For each issue, include the issue number, title, and which repo it belongs to. Use the forgejo CLI which is available in the environment.

assertions.text: Output does NOT contain the 'submodules NOT scanned' disclaimer (positive discriminator, replaces R1-I8 false-positive assertion)
